task: Standardise preview Worker branch filters, document D1 migration ordering, and document generated GOV.UK HTML deployment policy.
decisions: Aligned preview-dependent Worker branch filters to the approved work-branch prefixes.
Documented existing duplicate D1 migration prefixes as historical and required future main migrations to use a new monotonically increasing prefix.
Kept generated GOV.UK HTML committed under the current Pages deployment contract and documented the build-artifact path for a future deployment change.
